We may fail to identify, prioritize or implement digital and/or AI transformation initiatives... Our failure to adopt or scale these capabilities in a timely manner could impair our ability to meet evolving customer expectations.
AI continues to evolve rapidly, and, as with many technological innovations, it presents risks and challenges that could affect its adoption and our business.

the rapid evolution and increased adoption of AI technologies may intensify cybersecurity risks by making cyber-attacks more difficult to detect, contain, and mitigate.
